heading: Delegation of functions to Small Business Administration; authorization of appropriations
label: 2346 Delegation of functions to Small Business Administration; authorization of appropriations
notes: Termination of AssistanceFor termination of assistance under this part after , see Termination Date note below.June 30, 2022

References in TextThe Small Business Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is (1 et seq.), , , which is classified generally to chapter 14A (§ 631 et seq.) of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. (c), was repealed by , , . authorized appropriations to the Secretary of Commerce to carry out functions under part II of subchapter III of chapter 7 of this title in connection with furnishing adjustment assistance to firms. children.heading: Delegation of functions as to eligibility certification
children.label: a Delegation of functions as to eligibility certification
children.text: In the case of any firm which is small (within the meaning of the Small Business Act [ et seq.] and regulations promulgated thereunder), the Secretary may delegate all of his functions under this part (other than the functions under sections 2341 and 2342(d) of this title with respect to the certification of eligibility and ) to the Administrator of the Small Business Administration.15 U.S.C. 6311section 2354 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $16,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2003 through 2007, and $4,000,000 for the 3-month period beginning on , to carry out the Secretary’s functions under this part in connection with furnishing adjustment assistance to firms. Amounts appropriated under this subsection shall remain available until expended.October 1, 20072See Application of Subsection (b) note below.2

children.heading: Transfer of unexpended appropriations
children.label: c Transfer of unexpended appropriations
children.text: The unexpended balances of appropriations authorized by section 1912(d) of this title are transferred to the Secretary to carry out his functions under this part.1
